summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Newalkkarsaandiip marketing site. All 11 requested features verified and passing. Static site, no backend.
tests_executed: Hero section with heading, stats (15+, 10K+, 4.9*), CTAs (hero-cta-primary/secondary) - PASS
Nav links scroll to about/services/testimonials/contact sections - PASS
About section with portrait + 3 lineage chips (Chaldean, Pythagorean, Vastu Purush) - PASS
4 service cards (service-card-0..3) with correct titles - PASS
Empty form submission -> contact-error 'PLEASE SHARE YOUR NAME' - PASS
Invalid mobile (<10 digits) -> contact-error 'PLEASE ENTER A VALID 10-DIGIT MOBILE NUMBER' - PASS
Happy path: name+10-digit mobile+message -> popup URL opens with phone=919929059153 and name/mobile/message in text param (wa.me redirects to api.whatsapp.com/send) - PASS
Floating WhatsApp btn href = https://wa.me/919929059153 - PASS
Footer with brand logo, nav links, WhatsApp contact - PASS
contact-success banner shown after valid submit - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is ~790 lines; could be split into per-section components under /components for better maintainability (low priority for MVP).
WHATSAPP_NUMBER is hardcoded; consider moving to a config constant file or env if multiple contacts are planned.
handleSubmit uses window.open which may be blocked in strict popup-blocker scenarios; current behavior is fine because it is a direct user-click handler.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static marketing site. WhatsApp form flow verified — wa.me/919929059153 redirects to api.whatsapp.com/send/?phone=919929059153 with text param (expected WA behavior). All data-testids present and working. No issues found.
